steps.title: Solve for x
steps.content:
Multiply both sides by $2$.
$$x=1{,}240$$
The answer is 1240.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: The final check is to make sure the computed value answers exactly what the question asks for. The work above gives $1240$, and substituting or interpreting that value in the original condition satisfies the requirement. Therefore the value to enter is $1240$.
